facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 192 reviews. On a quiet street in Ông Lang that most tourists never reach.

Peace Corner sits on Đường Dinh Bà, away from the main drag, which is exactly why the people who find it keep rating it that high.

Ông Lang is the low-key side of Phu Quoc. If you're staying there or passing through, this spot belongs on your list.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking down Đường Dinh Bà in Ông Lang and this is what you find. 4.9 stars, 192 reviews, zero hype. Peace Corner earns every one of those ratings. Tag your travel buddy.
